design_philosophy: Bold, editorial, startup-first. High-end modern magazine meets trust-building sourcing tool. Emphasizes minimalism, wide white space, structural grayscale, and striking high-contrast accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary font-mono

marketing_pages.grid: Tetris Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12)
marketing_pages.alignment: Asymmetrical. Avoid strict center alignment for text. Use overlapping elements and negative space to guide the eye.

dashboards.grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6)
dashboards.alignment: Dense, structured, left-aligned. Every pixel utilized functionally.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-subheading uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-foreground bg-transparent text-foreground rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-subheading uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border rounded-none shadow-none transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: border-b-2 border-border bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 transition-colors font-body text-base

motion.scroll: lenis for smooth scrolling with momentum
motion.micro_interactions: Framer Motion for subtle stagger reveals on lists, 0.3s ease-out transitions for hover states
motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slight upward slide (y: 20 -> 0) on mount

hero_texture.description: Macro photography of raw manufacturing materials, brushed steel and folded fabric, high end editorial lighting. Use as a large abstract background block or hero image side panel.

abstract_supply_chain.description: Abstract geometric shapes representing supply chain and logistics. Use for AI matching features or empty states.

factory_architecture.description: Minimalist industrial building with a clear blue sky. Use for marketplace category headers or 'How it works' section.

testing.data_testid_guidelines: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, dialog triggers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case describing its role (e.g., 'buyer-login-button', 'rfq-submit-button', 'agent-search-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page for maximum creative control over the asymmetrical grid. Avoid restrictive Shadcn structural wrappers here.
Use Shadcn UI for the Dashboards, Forms, Modals, and Tables, but override the default rounded corners to 'rounded-none' and remove soft shadows to maintain the brutalist editorial aesthetic.
Inject 'Cormorant Garamond' via Google Fonts for all H1/H2 tags to secure the high-end magazine feel, contrasting heavily against 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement the agent search and RFQ functionalities matching the role-based views (Buyer vs Agent).
Never use generic placeholder images. Map the provided 'image_urls' precisely to their intended components.
